title: Authentication System PRD
content:
## Overview
Authentication system using OAuth 2.0 with JWT token management.
The system handles 10000 concurrent users with 99.9% uptime.

## Requirements
FR-001: User login must complete within 500ms for 95% of requests
FR-002: Token refresh must happen automatically 5 minutes before expiry
FR-003: Password reset emails must be sent within 30 seconds

## User Stories
STORY-001: As a registered user, I want to log in with email and password so that I can access my dashboard.
STORY-002: As an admin, I want to revoke user sessions so that I can enforce security policies.
STORY-003: As a mobile user, I want biometric login so that I can authenticate in under 2 seconds.

## Technical
Uses port/adapter pattern with protocol interfaces.
OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow with PKCE.
JWT tokens with RS256 signing, 1 hour expiry.
Rate limiting at 100 requests per minute per user.

## Acceptance
AC-001: Login returns JWT within 500ms
AC-002: Token expires in 1 hour
AC-003: Failed login after 5 attempts locks account for 15 minutes

## Assumptions
- Users have a stable internet connection with at least 1 Mbps bandwidth
- The identity provider supports OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow
- Mobile devices support biometric APIs (Face ID, Touch ID, fingerprint)
- Database can handle 10000 concurrent connections

## Roadmap
Sprint 1: Basic authentication flow
Sprint 2: Token refresh and session management
Sprint 3: Biometric login and MFA

## Testing
Integration tests with coverage threshold of 80%.
Load testing with 10000 concurrent users.
Security penetration testing for OWASP Top 10.

## Metrics
- Login success rate must exceed 99.5%
- Mean login latency must be below 200ms
- Token refresh failure rate must be below 0.1%
- Password reset completion rate must exceed 95%

requirements.text: Password reset emails sent within 30 seconds
